title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo, Luffy, Rebecca, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #17 as the first Colosseum fighters clash while Luffy tries to hide his identity and new rivals like Cavendish, Burgess, and Bartolomeo stand out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I see... so I ended up looking like this old guy after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Want to know about him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Whoa!! Is she a participant? That Lady GLA- Diator? ♥

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Hehehe ♤ looks weak... but she sure is cute ♥

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Who is she?

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: The Gladiator, Rebecca

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Thank you for what you did earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I hate that guy, Spartan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But this statue is of a legendary man.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: He was the strongest gladiator in the history of Corrida Colosseum, "Kyros"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The Undefeated winner of 3000 matches. And in all that time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: He only received a single wound from his enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That strong, huh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I've heard that he was active here until 20 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: But

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: No one in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: knows who he is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Huh??

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Neither the elderly nor any of the gladiators

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: have ever met him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is the most mysterious statue in all of dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Whether the Gladiator Kyros actually existed, or whether he was a mere contrivance ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And why this statue appeared one day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All we know is what's inscribed on this plate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nobody knew him... but nobody has ever tried to remove this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That too, is a mystery.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wahh... I don't know what you're talking about it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But I like this statue!! It's real manly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...I like it as well.

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: Yo!! Great Warrior Rebecca- Chan ❤

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We're looking forward to seeing the "undefeated woman" today!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Bet that made you feel good, before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Seeing your longtime bully Spartan put to shame!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ha ha cut that out, stupid

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: It's true, ain't it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What're they talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If G1,' false, email, updating a blog, add

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...pay them no mind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Today...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll end it ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'LL WIN THE MERA MERA NO MI...!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: And I'll have my revenge on Doflamingo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: On Mingo ...!?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: What block are you in?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Great! I'm in "D"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hope we're both still standing at the end of the first round.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lucy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The match is decided!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huh!? Already!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who is that? He's monstroously strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And in the blink of an eye, it's over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: The winner from A-block is the "Masked Man"!!! Mr. Store!!

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
